About Me

About Sir Waseem Uddin Qureshi

I am a dedicated and passionate English Language Teacher with strong communication and classroom management skills. I specialize in teaching Spoken English, Grammar, Vocabulary, and Communication Skills using interactive and student-friendly methods.

I believe in creating a positive learning environment where students feel confident to express themselves and achieve their language goals. My approach combines structured learning with real-world communication practice.
